phases.title: B2 Accuracy and Strong Input
phases.focus: Build advanced vocabulary, clearer pronunciation, grammar control, and daily input habits.

phases.title: Active Output and Professional English
phases.focus: Speak and write more often, organize ideas, fix recurring mistakes, and handle work scenarios.

phases.title: C1 Fluency, Nuance, and Autonomy
phases.focus: Consolidate C1 skills with long conversations, complex topics, precise style, and real work tasks.
